tests/parity/ Python+pytest black-box harness stood up: NabaRunner ($NABA_BIN), pytest-httpserver provider mock (Gemini :generateContent + /models, OpenRouter /api/v1/images) with request-recording, nondeterministic normalizer (SPEC-JSON-005), PTY runner, --preview PATH-stub. 9 smoke tests pass against Go binary; exercises SPEC-VERSION/GEN/PROVIDER/GLOBAL/DOCTOR/JSON clauses.

Async Provider trait (name/generate/list_models) + shared model (ImageConfig, GenerateRequest with per-provider raw quality carry, InputImage folded into generate, GeneratedImage, ModelInfo) in src/provider.rs. ImageConfig::new global-gate validation with verbatim SPEC-IMG-005 errors (exit 2); 512 passes global gate leaving room for per-model rejection (SPEC-IMG-007). async-trait dep. 9 unit tests pass.

GeminiProvider async port (src/provider/mod.rs refactored to dir + provider/gemini.rs): :generateContent, x-goog-api-key, responseModalities always, imageConfig omitempty (byte-matches Go tags), inline_data for edit/restore, GEMINI_BASE_URL, 120s. quality->model tier (model_for_quality exposed for 2.5). naba-a3a per-model 512 rejection (exit 2, pre-HTTP). list_models + model_reachable for doctor. parseAPIError exit mapping (401/403->3, 429->4, >=500->5, prompt-block/no-images->5, read-fail->10) verbatim. 32 tests pass (11 wiremock). reqwest/rustls, base64, serde; dev wiremock.

OpenRouterProvider (src/provider/openrouter.rs): POST /api/v1/images, Bearer auth (+HTTP-Referer/X-Title), aspect_ratio/resolution/native-quality mapping (quality is native param, no model swap per SPEC-PROVIDER-005), input_references[] data-URL for edit/restore, data[].b64_json decode, OPENROUTER_BASE_URL + with_base_url seam, default slug google/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview. auto-guard (exit 2, pre-HTTP, SPEC-PROVIDER-006). Error mapping 401/403->3, moderation-403->5, 429+Retry-After->4, >=500->5. // CONFIRM 2.6 markers isolate wire-field reconciliation. 52 tests pass (22 new).

Case table (16 files, 77 cases) + Go goldens (71 dirs/105 files incl 31 request.json) + data-driven test_parity.py driver with --update-golden. Covers all 12 command groups, full exit-code matrix, model/imageConfig/api-key precedence (incl per-provider quality case, rust-only skip on Go), validation enums, JSON shapes. 86/103 PINNED clauses covered (17 uncovered are MCP->1.4, help-text divergence, or rust-only IMG-007). Green: 86 passed, 1 skipped against Go binary.

Provider selector factory (src/provider/select.rs): resolve_selection (pure, testable) + select_provider. Precedence CLI>config>env-autodetect>fallback; only-gemini->gemini, only-openrouter->openrouter, both+no-config->openrouter default slug (SPEC-PROVIDER-008), neither->gemini fallback (key error deferred to call time, matches Go). Gemini model --model>--quality(model_for_quality)>config>default; OpenRouter --quality stays native (no model swap). --model requires --provider (exit 2, CLI-only). Early auto-guard (exit 2). Command-layer seam documented for 4.1. 76 tests pass (24 new).

Output layer (src/output.rs): Result JSON (exact field names/order, 2-space, omitempty via skip_serializing_if), print_json/multi/auto (single-vs-array SPEC-JSON-002, story-array-003), doctor envelope types (SPEC-JSON-004), write_image_result with auto-name naba-<cmd>-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS[-N].<ext>, JPEG<->PNG extension reconciliation (corrected flag + requested/actual formats), dedup -1..-999, 0o755/0o644 perms, mime/format helpers, extension-correction note string. CLI-vs-MCP output-dir split (SPEC-CFGSCHEMA-005): CLI never consults NABA_OUTPUT_DIR; mcp_output_dir resolves env>config>XDG. Non-blocking preview. chrono dep. 102 tests (26 new).

MCP-protocol harness (tests/parity/test_mcp.py) via mcp Python SDK stdio client: initialize, tools/list (8 tools + normalized golden mcp/tools.json, per-tool enums/defaults/bounds/required), tools/call (generate/edit/restore happy paths + validation error results), list_images (ordering/limit/empty/no-dir), resource template metadata. 23 cases: 20 passed, 3 xfail (Go resources/read broken). Epic 1 complete.

Config module (src/config.rs): Config struct 7 YAML keys (incl NEW provider) omitempty matching Go tags; config_dir (NABA_CONFIG_DIR else ~/.config/naba), config_path, load (missing->zero, parse-err->exit1, 3.2 seam), save (0o755/0o644), get/set, resolve_model (model>quality-tier>empty, invalid-quality SPEC-ERR-007), resolve_api_key (GEMINI env>config), resolve_openrouter_api_key (env-only), resolve_output_dir (MCP resolver), to_config_defaults (2.5 seam, resolved model), valid_keys. config get/set wired (exit 1/2/10, verbatim SPEC-ERR-008/009). serde_norway (NOT serde_yml, RUSTSEC-2025-0068 clear). 119 tests (17 new); CLI round-trip verified.

Core image commands (generate/edit/restore): prompt builders (src/prompt.rs, verbatim Go fragments+join, 7 tests), selection->config->imageConfig->provider->output pipeline in commands.rs. resolve_selection_for (config-tolerant, resolved keys feed selector, missing-key exit 3 at call time), resolve_image_config (flag>config>unset), GenerateRequest with resolved model+raw quality+input_image, count loop (not range-validated), progress/Saved/params per command, JSON single-vs-array. edit/restore input-file exit 10. 37 in-scope parity cases pass (all 15 gen/edit/restore + precedence/exit/json); 126 cargo tests. 5 non-defect remainders (naba-a3a divergence, cobra->clap parse text, provider valid-key, story stub). SPEC-ERR-016 workaround tracked as discovered bead -> 4.5.

Composite commands (icon/pattern/diagram/story): 4 prompt builders in src/prompt.rs (verbatim Go fragments, 8 tests). icon plain-generate (no imageConfig), per-size loop, SPEC-ICON-004 naming, --quality-only. pattern/diagram imageConfig path. story --steps 2..8 validation (exit 2) + always-array (SPEC-STORY-006). Reuses 4.1 pipeline. 16 in-scope parity cases green; 134 cargo tests. Full suite 56 pass/22 fail (all out-of-scope: doctor/skills 4.3, mcp 4.4, SPEC-ERR-016/cobra-clap divergences, naba-a3a).

Skill-embed infra (src/embed.rs): include_dir-embedded skills/ tree. SPEC-EMBED-004 DECISION: byte-for-byte Go hash parity ACHIEVED (EmbeddedTreeHash naba = 6dfa9939bac5f5f638088553813c1ce45f027e32a6423d18190dcac1e3e2d1cf, verified vs Go binary + pinned as GO_NABA_HASH literal) -> NO forced post-cutover skills upgrade needed (simplifies 5.3). API: skill_names/skill_files (dotfile+underscore excluded), read_skill_file, embedded/deployed_tree_hash (shared hash_tree, no newline norm, marker-stripped, lowercase hex), strip/format/inject/parse marker (idempotent, frontmatter-aware), SkillStatus (installed/up_to_date/complete/unmodified, SPEC-EMBED-003). include_dir/sha2/hex deps. 145 tests (11 new).

doctor + skills commands (src/doctor.rs, src/skills.rs). skills: resolve_dest (target>scope/surface), install/upgrade (0o755/0o644, marker injection, upgrade prune 'pruned stale'), remove (absent/dry-run/removed), status (SkillStatus.Line), messages verbatim, exit 1/10. doctor: check order (version no-colons/config/api_key/model_config/api_live/model_reachable/skills), provider-aware api_key/api_live/model_reachable (resolved provider list_models via mock), envelope {ok,failed,checks}, symbols, exit 1 on fail. Reuses embed/config/output/provider. M2 side effects verified. All 12 doctor/skills parity cases pass; 154 tests. Remaining 10 full-suite failures out-of-scope (mcp 4.4, config valid-key/parse-text/inventory/naba-a3a divergences -> 4.5 golden reconcile).

MCP server via rmcp 2.2.0 (features server, transport-io) in src/mcp.rs: low-level ServerHandler (get_info/list_tools/list_resource_templates/read_resource/call_tool), hand-built serde_json tool schemas (match 1.4 golden byte-for-byte, no schemars 'integer'/'$schema' drift). 8 tools reuse existing pipeline (resolve_selection->build_provider->generate->write_image_result, prompt::enrich_*); MCP output-dir via resolve_output_dir (SPEC-CFGSCHEMA-005). Tool-level validation error results. list_images ported. RESOURCES/READ FIX: direct file:// strip + slash path read (fixes Go RFC6570 simple-expansion bug) — 3 previously-xfail cases now PASS. naba mcp wired. 23/23 MCP harness cases pass; 162 cargo tests.

Config auto-migration (Concern 5) in src/config.rs: zero-rewrite default (migrate_if_needed/needs_structural_migration returns false for additive-optional schema -> file untouched, byte-identical proof test). Real migration engine migrate_file(path, needs-predicate): .bak backup of original first, serde_norway round-trip rewrite (0o644), idempotent, graceful (missing/empty/malformed/already-new). Synthetic structural-migration test exercises backup+rewrite+idempotency+comment-loss (SPEC-MIGRATE-003). serde_norway only. 168 tests (6 new). Epic 3 complete.
